name: fold-runtime
description: Fold Runtime — Local Context Agent for macOS

scripts.desktop:dev: dotenv -c -- pnpm --filter @fold/desktop rebuild:native && dotenv -c -- pnpm --parallel --filter @fold/asr-proxy --filter @fold/desktop dev
scripts.e2e:smoke: dotenv -c -- pnpm rebuild better-sqlite3 && dotenv -c -- bash scripts/e2e-smoke.sh
